matchedCandidate.identityEvidence: The Brazilian Forest Service LPF page explicitly identifies the record as Diploon cuspidatum = Diploon venezuelana and captions this image Corte tangencial.
matchedCandidate.visualCheckNotes: Opened at original resolution. The full frame is an exposed longitudinal wood surface with clear grain and no living plant, bark-only subject, product scene, generic texture, illustration, or microscopy.
matchedCandidate.creator: Serviço Florestal Brasileiro, Laboratório de Produtos Florestais (LPF/SFB)
